title: All People Powered: Eric Ries Judges $30K Pitch Contest in Oakland
summary: Eric serves as a judge at the All People Powered concert and pitch competition inside the Co-Founders hip-hop musical at Calvin Simmons Theatre in Oakland, California. Described as 'Soul Beat meets Shark Tank,' three Bay Area startups compete for $30,000 in funding. The event blends entrepreneurship, music, and community — a fitting showcase for the book's argument that business can be a force for good.
blockquote: Soul Beat meets Shark Tank — three Bay Area startups compete for $30,000 inside a hip-hop musical about building companies that matter.
